UserService/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
UserService/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 language features and bytecode compatibility.

UserService/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the Java version property.
UserService/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce cross-compilation to the target Java version, potentially resulting in bytecode incompatible with Java 21 or missing strict API checks.
